regional_cost_note: Drainage specialists in Gisborne typically charge $85–$160/m for French drains, $1,600–$4,200 for soakpits, and $5,500–$28,000+ for full site drainage. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. Poor site drainage is one of the most common causes of foundation problems — a drainage assessment is worthwhile before any significant earthworks.
